{% extends "layouts/admin.html" %} {% block title %}Vendor Purchase Invoice Detail - Admin{% endblock %} {% block content %} {% set user_permissions = current_user.permissions if current_user is defined and current_user else [] %} {% set user_roles = current_user.roles if current_user is defined and current_user else [] %} {% set user_roles_lower = user_roles | map('lower') | list %} {% set can_review_invoice = 'admin' in user_roles_lower or 'vendors:quotes:update' in user_permissions %} {% set invoice_status = invoice.status.value if invoice.status else '' %}

Purchase invoice sent back for revision.

{% endif %}

Line items

Description Type Qty Unit Price Amount

{% endif %}

Supporting Attachment

{% if invoice.attachment_file_name %}

{{ invoice.attachment_mime_type or 'file' }}{% if invoice.attachment_file_size %} • {{ invoice.attachment_file_size }} bytes{% endif %}

Review Outcome

Reviewed By
{{ reviewer_label or "—" }}
Reviewed At
{{ invoice.reviewed_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z') if invoice.reviewed_at else '—' }}
